entry.title: New: Bill 166, CD1 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, ESTIMATED REVENUES; DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, OFFICE OF RECOVERY PROGRAM; CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT; AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
